sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88387" key="proprh/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προπρήων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, sine expl., perh. compd. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρηών,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:p.71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.71</biblScope> </bibl> Gaisford, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
